stories.title: Fix CSP to allow Umami analytics and inline styles
stories.description: In src/worker/lib/csp.ts, update SECURITY_HEADERS_PUBLIC_CSP to add https://cloud.umami.is to script-src. The current value is: "default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https://*.r2.dev; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'". Change script-src to: script-src 'self' https://cloud.umami.is. Also add connect-src 'self' https://cloud.umami.is (Umami sends analytics via fetch). GitHub issue #393.

stories.title: Fix hero subtitle overlap on tablet viewport
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/HeroAscii.jsx, add responsive bottom margin to the subtitle element (around line 311-316). Change className from 'text-base sm:text-xl md:text-2xl text-gray-400 mb-8' to 'text-base sm:text-xl md:text-2xl text-gray-400 mb-12 md:mb-16'. This ensures enough space between subtitle and the CTA buttons below on tablet. GitHub issue #394.
acceptance_criteria: Subtitle has increased bottom margin on tablet
No text overlap with CTA buttons at 768px

stories.title: Show campaign target institution name instead of raw 'Target' label
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/ActiveAlerts.jsx, find where 'Target' is displayed as a label. Replace with the actual alert.target value (the institution name like 'ING Bank', 'ANAF'). If alert.target is empty/null, hide the field entirely instead of showing 'Target'. The data comes from /api/alerts which returns campaign objects with a target field. GitHub issue #395.
acceptance_criteria: Campaign cards show institution name (e.g., 'ING Bank') not 'Target'

stories.title: Fix cookie consent banner overlapping footer
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/CookieConsent.jsx, the banner overlays footer content. Fix by adding padding-bottom to the main content area when consent banner is visible. In App.jsx, add a spacer div or pb-20 class to main when the consent state is not yet set. Alternatively, make the consent banner position: sticky at the bottom with a background that doesn't cover content. GitHub issue #396.
acceptance_criteria: Footer content visible when consent banner is shown
Banner does not cover page content

stories.title: Fix quiz page title clipped by header
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/Quiz.jsx, the quiz title 'Quiz: Do You Recognize Fraud?' is partially hidden behind the fixed header. Add pt-24 to the quiz container div (same pattern used by ContentList.jsx). GitHub issue #397.
acceptance_criteria: Quiz title fully visible below header

stories.title: Standardize campaign severity badge colors
stories.description: In src/ui/src/components/ActiveAlerts.jsx, standardize badge colors: status 'active' = green badge, 'inactive' = gray; severity 'high'/'critical' = red, 'moderate'/'medium' = yellow/amber, 'low' = green. Currently some active badges show as red which is confusing. GitHub issue #398.
